summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The shard is not a dedupe cluster, so no canonical was selected. Hydrated non-security PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer proof/review paths; #92394 and #92456 are routed to central security handling per the preflight artifact; refs whose live state was unavailable are blocked for human/refreshed hydration before classification.
